name: ahv_temporal_rl_v1
cohort: AHV Inspection Unit; 782 records; observational administrative labels

temporal_split.rule: strictly earlier complaint creation timestamps train policies; later timestamps evaluate them

uncertainty: 95% bootstrap confidence intervals across declared simulation seeds
equity_boundary: Borough metrics are operational geography slices only. They are not demographic fairness metrics or proxies.
release_boundary: No result becomes public-facing until the private Decision Brief confirms artifact lineage, temporal split, uncertainty, and limitations.
